---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea to improve Switchboard
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Be specific. -->
<!-- Example: "I want to track costs per session but there's no way to..." -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- How would you solve this? A clear description is enough — pseudo-code welcome. -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- Other ways you've thought about solving this, and why they don't work as well. -->

## Impact
<!-- Who would benefit from this? How many users? Is it a niche or general need? -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Any related issues, links, screenshots, or mockups. -->
